name: pi-exit-command
description: Adds /exit as an alias for /quit in pi.
readme:
# pi-exit-command

Adds `/exit` as an alias for `/quit` in [pi](https://pi.dev).

## Install

```bash
pi install npm:pi-exit-command
```

## Usage

Inside pi:

```text
/exit
```

This gracefully shuts down pi, same as `/quit`.
